name: Lemon-Crab Spread
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Imitation crab meat (you can also use crabmeat, smoked fish, salmon, or any cooked white fish)
Finely grated rind of one lemon
1/2 tablespoon Lemon juice or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate crabmeat or fish with a fork until finely shredded.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: sour cream, garlic powder, mayonnaise, and salt.
3. Add the shredded crabmeat to the mixture; stir gently.
4. Chill the spread in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving.
5. Serve with crackers or dipping vegetables.
